## Feature Description

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits?
- Affected persons (Venezuela earthquake victims)
- Volunteers and aid workers
- Medical professionals
- Developers building on top of our platform

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Integration with Data Sources

Does this feature require new data sources or APIs?
- [ ] SOS Venezuela 2026
- [ ] Apoyo Venezuela
- [ ] ApoyoVzla
- [ ] Red Solidaria Venezuela
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
